transcription.text: Growing up, my mom let me use her home as an ice rink. She just grabbed the Bounty Select-A-Size. One Select-A-Size sheet of Bounty is 50% more absorbent than a full-size sheet of the leading ordinary brand. Use less with Bounty Select-A-Size.

segments.text: Growing up, my mom let me use her home as an ice rink.
She just grabbed the Bounty Select-A-Size.
One Select-A-Size sheet of Bounty is 50% more absorbent than a full-size sheet of the leading ordinary brand.

metadata.title: 2013 Bounty Paper Towels Select-a-Size featuring Julie Chu an american olympian
